title: Senior Frontend Engineer [React] - WCAN
description:
Responsibilities:

  • Design and evaluate scalable, high-performance, and maintainable frontend systems for web and mobile platforms, ensuring consistency, responsiveness, and accessibility across all devices.
  • Serve as a frontend subject matter expert, guiding teams through architectural decisions, design reviews, and technology selections.
  • Translate complex product and business objectives into practical, scalable frontend architectures that enable sustainable growth and innovation.
  • Develop and maintain reusable UI components and design systems to drive efficiency, consistency, and quality across teams.
  • Establish and uphold engineering standards, tooling, and best practices in areas such as performance optimization, automated testing, CI/CD, accessibility, and cross-platform deployment.
  • Mentor engineers, promote knowledge sharing, and foster a collaborative, high-performance engineering culture.


Qualifications:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computing, Software Engineering, Information Technology, or a related field.
  • Minimum 6 years of experience designing, building, and scaling large frontend systems for both web and mobile platforms.
  • Proficient in JavaScript, TypeScript, React.js, React Native, Next.js
  • Experienced in designing and implementing scalable, high-performance frontend applications with seamless web–mobile integration, micro-frontend architecture, and offline capabilities.
  • Skilled in frontend best practices, including coding standards, CI/CD automation, design system management, and performance optimization.
  • Continuously explores and adopts emerging UI/UX trends and frontend technologies to improve usability, maintainability, and overall product quality.
  • Proficient in identifying and resolving technical risks, managing technical debt, and ensuring accessibility and long-term system stability.


We regret only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. All applications will be handled confidentially. By submitting your application, you agree to the collection, use, retention, and disclosure of your personal information to prospective employers.


Wecruit Pte Ltd

EA Personnel: Nyon Hock Sen (Aden)

postedCompany.description:
Wecruit is one of the leading recruitment firms based in Singapore, dedicated to helping job seekers find the right career opportunities.


We partner with reputable companies across a wide range of industries, including Healthcare, IT, Corporate Support, Engineering, Education, Logistics & Supply Chain, Oil & Gas, and Maritime. 


Whether you're looking for permanent roles or short-term assignments, our consultants take the time to understand your experience, preferences, and goals to match you with suitable roles.

With over 1,000 successful placements and a strong track record of candidate satisfaction, Wecruit is here to support your career journey.


Let us help you take the next step—reach out to explore current opportunities or to speak with our team.
